title: How to Get 4000 Watch Hours on YouTube Fast
description:
Want to know how to get 4000 watch hours on YouTube and unlock monetization? This tutorial breaks down exactly how many views you need to reach 4000 watch hours for the YouTube Partner Program. YouTube monetization requirements include 1000 subscribers and 4000 valid public watch hours in the last 12 months—that's 240,000 minutes of watch time.
Learn how to calculate your path to getting paid on YouTube based on your average view duration. How many minutes is 4000 watch hours? We'll show you the math: if you get 2 minutes per view, you need 120K views. At 5 minutes per view, only 48K views. At 10 minutes, just 24K views. And at 20 minutes watched per view, you only need 12K views to hit monetization.
We'll walk you through finding your average view duration in YouTube Studio Analytics and calculating exactly how long it takes to get 4000 watch hours. Whether you're wondering how to get paid on YouTube or how to reach YouTube monetized requirements faster, this guide answers all your questions about watch time and monetization.
